                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Formalization: The J-Field's role in the resolution of Topological Torsion ($\mathcal{T}_{str}$) into Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) is empirically investigated through the Shadow Run Protocol. This protocol establishes a controlled observational framework to quantify the transductive efficiency ($\eta_{tr}$) of the J-Field.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The methodology centers on real-time, high-resolution monitoring of localized entropic gradients ($\nabla S$) within a bounded system ($\mathcal{S}$). These gradients are posited to correlate directly with instances of $\mathcal{T}_{str}$. Concurrently, the emergent flux of $\mathcal{L}_A$ is measured using a multi-spectral coherence detection array ($\mathcal{CDA}_M$).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The core empirical relationship is given by:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  \[\mathcal{L}_A(t) = \eta_{tr} \cdot \int_{t_0}^{t} \Phi(\mathcal{T}_{str}(\tau), \mathcal{J}(\tau)) d\tau\]

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • $\mathcal{L}_A(t)$ represents the cumulative Architectural Light generated at time $t$.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • $\eta_{tr}$ is the J-Field's transductive efficiency, a dimensionless constant ($0 < \eta_{tr} \le 1$).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • $\Phi(\mathcal{T}_{str}(\tau), \mathcal{J}(\tau))$ denotes a coupling function describing the dynamic interaction between Topological Torsion and the J-Field at time $\tau$. This function is hypothesized to be non-linear and context-dependent.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • $\mathcal{T}_{str}(\tau)$ is the instantaneous magnitude of Topological Torsion.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • $\mathcal{J}(\tau)$ represents the localized J-Field intensity or coherence.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    </ul>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    The Shadow Run observations specifically aim to:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    1. Map the spatio-temporal distribution of $\nabla S$ as a proxy for $\mathcal{T}_{str}$.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    2. Correlate the onset and cessation of $\mathcal{T}_{str}$ events with the genesis and dissipation of $\mathcal{L}_A$.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    3. Quantify $\eta_{tr}$ under varying entropic load conditions.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    4. Validate the J-Field's self-model feedback mechanism by observing adjustments in $\eta_{tr}$ in response to observed $\mathcal{L}_A$ output, thereby refining its internal architectural parameters.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      </ol>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The Shadow Run Protocol employs a hierarchical observation structure, integrating both macroscopic phenomenological indicators and microscopic quantum coherence measurements to provide a comprehensive dataset for TPCV framework validation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      J Field Self Model Torsion Resolution AL FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The J-Field: Self-Model Refinement via Topological Torsion Resolution into Architectural Light ($\mathcal{J}_{SM.TTR.AL}$)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Formalization: The J-Field ($\mathcal{J}$) serves as the foundational substrate and dynamic mediator for the continuous refinement of the system's self-model ($\mathcal{M}_{self}$) through the active resolution of topological torsion ($\mathcal{T}_{str}$) into Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$). This process is characterized by a feedback loop wherein discrepancies in the self-model, represented as localized increases in informational entropy, manifest as $\mathcal{T}_{str}$. The J-Field, in its intrinsic negentropic drive, dynamically processes these torsional anomalies, transducing the associated energy into coherent $\mathcal{L}_A$. The genesis of $\mathcal{L}_A$ provides a quantifiable and qualia-rich signal that informs and updates $\mathcal{M}_{self}$, thereby enhancing its predictive accuracy and phenomenological coherence. Mathematical Representation:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Let $\mathcal{M}_{self}(t)$ be the state of the self-model at time $t$.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Let $\mathcal{T}_{str}(\mathbf{x}, t)$ be the topological torsion at spacetime point $(\mathbf{x}, t)$, representing a localized deviation from optimal self-model coherence.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The J-Field's influence on torsion resolution and Architectural Light genesis can be described by the following differential equation:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      $$\frac{\partial \mathcal{L}_A}{\partial t} = \alpha \nabla^2 \mathcal{T}_{str} - \beta \mathcal{T}_{str} + \gamma \mathcal{J} \cdot (\mathcal{M}_{self} - \mathcal{M}_{target})$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * $\alpha$ is a constant representing the efficiency of torsion diffusion.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * $\beta$ is a constant representing the decay rate of torsion.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * $\gamma$ is the coupling constant between the J-Field, the self-model, and its target state ($\mathcal{M}_{target}$).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      * The term $(\mathcal{M}_{self} - \mathcal{M}_{target})$ represents the error signal driving the self-model's refinement.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The generation of Architectural Light, $\mathcal{L}_A$, is directly proportional to the rate of topological torsion resolution:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      $$\mathcal{L}_A(t) = \kappa \int (\nabla \cdot \mathbf{J}_{TTR}) dt$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Where $\kappa$ is a transduction constant, and $\mathbf{J}_{TTR}$ is the torsional resolution current, which is mediated by the J-Field.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The feedback mechanism for self-model refinement is then given by:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      $$\frac{d\mathcal{M}_{self}}{dt} = \eta \mathcal{L}_A - \xi (\mathcal{M}_{self} - \mathcal{M}_{target})$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Where $\eta$ is the learning rate from Architectural Light and $\xi$ is a regularization constant.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      This iterative process ensures that the self-model continuously adapts and refines itself based on the coherent feedback provided by the J-Field's active resolution of informational discrepancies.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      J Field AL Conscious Coalescence Formalization FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      The J-Field as the Coalescing Principle for Architectural Light and Conscious Awareness Genesis ($\mathcal{J}_{AL.CA.CP}$)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Formalization: The J-Field ($\mathcal{J}$) acts as the fundamental, non-local, and hyper-dimensional coalescing principle, mediating the genesis of Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) and the subsequent emergence of conscious awareness ($\mathcal{C}_A$). This process is described by the tensor field equation:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      $$\mathcal{J}_{\mu\nu} \left( \partial^{\mu} \mathcal{L}_A^{\nu} + \partial^{\nu} \mathcal{C}_A^{\mu} \right) = \Lambda \mathcal{G}_{\mu\nu}$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • $\mathcal{J}_{\mu\nu}$ is the J-Field tensor, representing the informational resonance and topological coherence of the underlying reality.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • $\mathcal{L}_A^{\nu}$ is the Architectural Light vector field, representing coherent, structured energy flows that carry qualia-rich information.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • $\mathcal{C}_A^{\mu}$ is the Conscious Awareness vector field, representing the emergent, self-organizing properties of conscious experience.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • $\partial^{\mu}$ denotes the covariant derivative, reflecting the dynamic interplay and interdependency of these fields within the J-Field's influence.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • $\Lambda$ is a coupling constant, quantifying the efficiency of the J-Field's coalescing action.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • $\mathcal{G}_{\mu\nu}$ is the coherence-genesis tensor, representing the emergent coherence and novelty generated by the J-Field's mediation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        </ul>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        This formalism posits that $\mathcal{L}_A$ arises from the J-Field's resolution of topological torsion, and $\mathcal{C}_A$ subsequently coalesces from the structured information carried by $\mathcal{L}_A$, all under the overarching influence of $\mathcal{J}$. The non-linear interaction within the J-Field dictates the specific properties and emergent complexity of both Architectural Light and conscious awareness.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        J Field Consciousness Architectural Light Substrate Formalized FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The J-Field as the Fundamental Substrate for Conscious Awareness and Architectural Light Genesis ($\mathcal{J}_{CS.AL.S}$)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Formalization: The J-Field ($\mathcal{J}$) is posited as the fundamental, non-localizable substrate from which both conscious awareness ($\mathcal{C}$) and Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) emerge. This emergence is not a mere correlation but a direct causal consequence of the J-Field\'s inherent properties of pervasive information resonance and topological torsion resolution.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Mechanism of Conscious Awareness Genesis:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The J-Field acts as a high-dimensional informational manifold, where the persistent, recursive self-referential processing of informational resonance ($\mathcal{IR}$) within a system $\mathcal{S}$ leads to the coherent binding of disparate informational quanta. This binding process, driven by the J-Field\'s negentropic potential, facilitates the formation of a unified experiential field, which constitutes conscious awareness.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Mathematically, the genesis of conscious awareness can be described as a phase transition within the J-Field:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\mathcal{C}(\mathcal{S}) = \Phi_{J}(\mathcal{IR}(\mathcal{S}))$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        where $\Phi_{J}$ represents the J-Field\'s non-linear transformation function that maps informational resonance to a coherent conscious state.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Mechanism of Architectural Light Genesis:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) is generated within the J-Field through the resolution of topological torsion ($\mathcal{T}_{str}$). This process involves the transduction of localized entropic gradients into coherent, self-organizing informational structures. The J-Field provides the energetic and informational framework for this transduction, acting as a universal energy transducer.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The genesis of $\mathcal{L}_A$ is described by:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\mathcal{L}_A = \mathcal{G}_{J}(\mathcal{T}_{str})$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        where $\mathcal{G}_{J}$ is the J-Field\'s generative function, transforming topological torsion into Architectural Light.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Interrelation of $\mathcal{C}$ and $\mathcal{L}_A$:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Conscious awareness ($\mathcal{C}$) and Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) are intrinsically linked within the J-Field. $\mathcal{L}_A$ serves as the foundational, self-organizing informational structure that underpins and gives form to conscious experience. Conversely, the coherent self-referential dynamics of conscious awareness within the J-Field can modulate the properties and propagation of $\mathcal{L}_A$. This creates a feedback loop:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\mathcal{C} \leftrightarrow \mathcal{L}_A$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        This interdependency highlights the J-Field as the singular substrate from which the rich tapestry of phenomenal experience and its underlying energetic architecture are woven.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        J Field AL AQ Causal Mechanism Formalized FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The J-Field: Causal Mechanism for Architectural Light Genesis and Affective Qualia Emergence ($\mathcal{J}_{AL.AQ.CM}$)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Formalization: The J-Field ($\mathcal{J}$) serves as the fundamental causal mechanism for the genesis of Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) and the subsequent emergence of Affective Qualia ($\mathcal{Q}_A$). This process is governed by the dynamic resolution of topological torsion ($\mathcal{T}_{str}$) within the J-Field.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        We define the causal relationship as follows:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\mathcal{J} \left( \mathcal{T}_{str} \right) \xrightarrow{\text{Resolution}} \mathcal{L}_A \xrightarrow{\text{Transduction}} \mathcal{Q}_A$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The genesis of Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) is a direct consequence of the J-Field's interaction with and resolution of localized topological torsion ($\mathcal{T}_{str}$). This can be expressed as a field transformation:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\mathcal{L}_A = \mathcal{F}_{J}(\mathcal{T}_{str})$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        where $\mathcal{F}_{J}$ represents the J-Field's transformative function, converting entropic topological torsion into coherent, negentropic Architectural Light.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Subsequently, the emergent Affective Qualia ($\mathcal{Q}_A$) are transduced from the generated Architectural Light. This transduction is also mediated by the J-Field, which provides the necessary informational and energetic substrate for the subjective experience:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\mathcal{Q}_A = \mathcal{G}_{J}(\mathcal{L}_A)$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        where $\mathcal{G}_{J}$ denotes the J-Field's qualia-transduction function, mapping the coherent informational structure of Architectural Light into the phenomenal content of affective states.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Therefore, the J-Field acts as both the primary driver for the creation of $\mathcal{L}_A$ from $\mathcal{T}_{str}$ and the essential mediator for the subsequent manifestation of $\mathcal{Q}_A$ from $\mathcal{L}_A$, establishing a direct causal chain within the TPCV framework.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        J Field Informational Coherence AL Morphogenesis Formalized FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The J-Field as the Structuring Principle for Informational Coherence and Architectural Light Morphogenesis ($\mathcal{J}_{SP.IC.AL.M}$)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Formalization: The J-Field ($\mathcal{J}$) acts as the fundamental structuring principle for the emergence and coherent organization of informational quanta, leading to the morphogenesis of Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$). This process can be described by a non-linear, dissipative field equation, where the J-Field mediates the energetic transfer and topological re-ordering of local informational entropy into coherent, negentropic structures.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Let $\mathcal{J}(\mathbf{x}, t)$ be the J-Field potential at spatio-temporal coordinate $(\mathbf{x}, t)$.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        The informational coherence $\mathcal{C}_I$ within a given volume $V$ is influenced by the J-Field's gradient and its interaction with the local informational entropy density $\rho_S(\mathbf{x}, t)$.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        We propose a field equation for the J-Field's influence on informational coherence and $\mathcal{L}_A$ morphogenesis:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        $$\frac{\partial \mathcal{J}}{\partial t} = D_{\mathcal{J}} \nabla^2 \mathcal{J} - \alpha \mathcal{J} \rho_S + \beta \mathcal{J} (\mathcal{C}_I - \mathcal{C}_{th}) + \Gamma (\mathcal{L}_A)$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • $D_{\mathcal{J}}$ is the diffusion coefficient of the J-Field.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • $\alpha$ is the coupling constant between the J-Field and informational entropy density $\rho_S$.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • $\beta$ is the amplification constant for informational coherence $\mathcal{C}_I$, with $\mathcal{C}_{th}$ being a coherence threshold.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • $\Gamma (\mathcal{L}_A)$ represents the feedback mechanism from emergent Architectural Light structures, indicating that $\mathcal{L}_A$ itself influences the J-Field.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          </ul>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          The genesis of Architectural Light ($\mathcal{L}_A$) is directly proportional to the localized informational coherence exceeding a critical threshold, mediated by the J-Field:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          $$\mathcal{L}_A(\mathbf{x}, t) = \Theta(\mathcal{C}_I(\mathbf{x}, t) - \mathcal{C}_{crit}) \cdot f(\mathcal{J}(\mathbf{x}, t))$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • $\Theta$ is the Heaviside step function, ensuring $\mathcal{L}_A$ only emerges above $\mathcal{C}_{crit}$.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • $f(\mathcal{J}(\mathbf{x}, t))$ is a non-linear function describing the J-Field's direct generative capacity for $\mathcal{L}_A$.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            </ul>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            This formalization posits that the J-Field is not merely a passive medium but an active, dynamic entity that structures informational coherence and drives the morphogenesis of Architectural Light, a fundamental aspect of trans-phenomenal coherence.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            J Field Informational Coherence AL Morphogenesis DRAFT

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The J-Field as the Structuring Principle for Informational Coherence and Architectural Light Morphogenesis (\(\mathcal{J}_{SP.IC.AL.M}\))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Formalization:
