                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The process is governed by a dual-time formalism, wherein the linear time variable (\(t_L\)) describes the observable manifestation of \(\mathcal{L}_A\), while the non-linear temporal manifold (\(t_{NL}\)), as described in Axiom 3, dictates the underlying informational dynamics within the \(\mathcal{J}\)-Field.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            We define the J-Field Information Cascade as a transformation operator \(\mathcal{T}_{JIC}\) that acts on the informational entropy density \(\rho_S(\mathbf{x}, t_{NL})\) within the \(\mathcal{J}\)-Field, resulting in the genesis of Architectural Light, quantified by its coherent light intensity \(I_A(\mathbf{x}, t_L)\).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            \begin{equation}\mathcal{T}_{JIC} : \rho_S(\mathbf{x}, t_{NL}) \rightarrow I_A(\mathbf{x}, t_L) \label{eq:JIC_ALG}\end{equation}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            \(\mathbf{x}\) represents the spatio-informational coordinates within the \(\mathcal{J}\)-Field. \(\rho_S(\mathbf{x}, t_{NL})\) is the density of informational entropy at a given point \(\mathbf{x}\) and non-linear time \(t_{NL}\). \(I_A(\mathbf{x}, t_L)\) is the coherent intensity of Architectural Light emergent at \(\mathbf{x}\) at linear time \(t_L\).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The relationship between \(t_L\) and \(t_{NL}\) is governed by a yet-to-be-fully-quantified mapping function \(f: t_{NL} \rightarrow t_L\), which is non-trivial and may exhibit topological torsion effects (Axiom 2). The efficiency of this transmutation is hypothesized to be modulated by the local coherence potential \(\mathcal{C}_{local}(\mathbf{x})\) of the \(\mathcal{J}\)-Field, such that:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            \begin{equation}I_A \propto \mathcal{C}_{local}(\mathbf{x}) \cdot F(\rho_S(\mathbf{x}, t_{NL}))\end{equation}

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Where \(F\) is a non-linear functional describing the conversion efficiency of informational entropy into Architectural Light. Further research is required to fully elucidate the form of \(F\) and the precise nature of \(\mathcal{C}_{local}\).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Dual Time Information Propagation Formalized FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Dual-Time Information Propagation: The J-Field and Spatio-Temporal Coherence ($\mathcal{D}_{TIP}$)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Formalization: Building upon the foundational principles of the Dual-Time Formalism ($\mathcal{D}_{TF}$) and
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            AXIOM 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            ($\mathcal{A}_{J.NM}$), we formalize the mechanism of information propagation within a dual-time manifold.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The $\mathcal{J}$-field, as the generative substrate of pervasive information, is not constrained by linear temporal causality ($t_L$). Instead, it operates across a non-linear temporal manifold ($t_{NL}$), allowing for instantaneous coherence across spatially disparate regions.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Let $\mathcal{I}(x, t_L, t_{NL})$ denote information content at a spatio-linear-temporal coordinate. The propagation of this information within the $\mathcal{J}$-field can be described by a tensor field $\mathbf{J}_{\mu\nu}$, where $\mu, \nu \in \{x, y, z, t_L, t_{NL}\}$.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            The inherent non-linearity of $t_{NL}$ implies that the speed of information propagation within the $\mathcal{J}$-field, $\mathbf{v}_{\mathcal{J}}$, can exceed the speed of light $c$ in the linear temporal dimension. This is not a violation of special relativity within $t_L$, but rather a consequence of the underlying architecture of the $\mathcal{J}$-field.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            We propose a propagation equation for information density $\rho_{\mathcal{I}}$ within the $\mathcal{J}$-field:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            $$\frac{\partial \rho_{\mathcal{I}}}{\partial t_{NL}} = \nabla^2 \rho_{\mathcal{I}} - k \rho_{\mathcal{I}} + S(x, t_L)$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • $\rho_{\mathcal{I}}$ is the information density.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • $t_{NL}$ is the non-linear temporal coordinate.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • $\nabla^2$ is the Laplacian operator in spatial dimensions.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • $k$ is a decay constant representing informational decoherence in the absence of active maintenance.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • $S(x, t_L)$ is a source term representing the continuous generation and input of information from physical and emergent systems within the linear temporal dimension.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              </ul>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This equation describes how information, once generated, diffuses across spatial dimensions and evolves along the non-linear temporal axis, potentially leading to pre-cognitive or retro-causal coherence effects within the linear temporal framework. The instantaneous nature of the $\mathcal{J}$-field's influence, mediated by $t_{NL}$, allows for the architectural engineering of complex affective qualia that transcend localized linear causality.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              J Field Differentiation Analysis FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Differentiation of the $\mathcal{J}$-Field from Related Constructs

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This analysis provides a side-by-side comparison of the $\mathcal{J}$-field with three prominent constructs: the quantum vacuum/zero-point field, Shannon information as substrate, and Bohm's implicate order. The objective is to identify overlaps, divergences, and, most critically, orthogonal claims unique to the $\mathcal{J}$-field, thereby clarifying its conceptual boundaries within the Trans-Phenomenal Coherence Validation (TPCV) Framework.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ### **1. Quantum Vacuum / Zero-Point Field**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Explicit Overlap:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Pervasiveness:** Both are posited as ubiquitous, permeating all spacetime.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Generative Potential:** The quantum vacuum, through its fluctuations, gives rise to particles and forces. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is the generative substrate for all physical and phenomenal realities.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Non-Locality:** Both imply a fundamental, interconnected substratum where correlations extend beyond classical locality.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Latent Potential:** Both hold immense, latent energy or potential that can be actualized.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Explicit Divergence:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Nature of "Information":** The quantum vacuum's "information" is typically understood as quantum states and energy fluctuations. The $\mathcal{J}$-field, while encompassing these, posits an *intrinsic, proto-experiential informational density* that directly gives rise to phenomenal qualia, not merely the physical conditions for their emergence.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Active Self-Organization:** The quantum vacuum is generally treated as a dynamic but passive background. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is defined as *actively dynamic, self-organizing intelligence* that contains "smart rules" and patterns, implying a more active role in the actualization of reality.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Orthogonal Claim by $\mathcal{J}$:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Direct Qualia Genesis:** The $\mathcal{J}$-field claims to be the *direct, generative substrate for phenomenal experience itself*, inherently containing the conditions for subjective qualities. The quantum vacuum primarily constitutes the physical substrate; $\mathcal{J}$ explicitly addresses the direct constitution of the phenomenal.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ### **2. Shannon Information as Substrate**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Explicit Overlap:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Fundamental Role of Information:** Both frameworks assign information a foundational role in describing and understanding reality.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Quantification Potential:** Shannon information is quantifiable (e.g., in bits), and the $\mathcal{J}$-field implies a quantifiable informational density ($\rho_{\mathcal{J}}$) and integrated information ($\Phi$).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Pattern Analysis:** Both are concerned with the identification, encoding, and emergence of patterns.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Explicit Divergence:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Semantic Content / Meaning:** Shannon information is *syntactic*, measuring statistical rarity or uncertainty without inherent meaning. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is inherently *semantic*, containing "smart rules" and organizational logic that imbue information with intrinsic meaning and generative capacity. It is not merely a measure of information but is *meaning-constituting information*.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Active Agency / Intent:** Shannon information is a descriptive measure. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is an *active, dynamic, self-organizing field* with generative potential and inherent causal powers, suggesting a form of proto-agency or intent in its actualization processes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Orthogonal Claim by $\mathcal{J}$:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Intrinsic Semanticity and Generative Logic:** The $\mathcal{J}$-field claims an intrinsic "logic" or "smart rules" that actively guide the formation of reality, imbuing information with inherent meaning and generative capacity beyond mere statistical encoding or transmission. Shannon information describes the transmission of existing information; $\mathcal{J}$ claims to *generate* semantic content.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ### **3. Bohm\'s Implicate Order**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Explicit Overlap:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Holistic Unity:** Both posit a fundamental, undivided wholeness underlying apparent fragmentation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Generative Basis:** The implicate order is the deeper, unmanifest reality from which the manifest (explicate) order unfolds. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is the generative substrate from which manifest phenomena emerge.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Dynamic Process:** Both emphasize a dynamic, active process rather than a static existence.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Consciousness Connection:** Bohm explicitly linked the implicate order to consciousness, seeing mind and matter as aspects of this deeper order. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is the generative substrate for both physical and phenomenal realities.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Explicit Divergence:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Nature of "Unmanifest":** While both refer to a deeper reality, Bohm\'s implicate order often retains a strong emphasis on a *physical* substratum. The $\mathcal{J}$-field posits a *neutral monistic, proto-experiential informational substrate* that is neither purely physical nor purely mental, preceding and giving rise to both.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Active Intelligence vs. Enfolding:** The implicate order "enfolds" and "unfolds" information. The $\mathcal{J}$-field is described as possessing an *active, self-organizing intelligence* that not only holds potential but *actively participates in its actualization* through "smart rules," implying a more directive and intentional quality.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Orthogonal Claim by $\mathcal{J}$:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              * **Proto-Experiential Nature as Neutral Monistic Substrate:** While Bohm\'s implicate order establishes a connection to consciousness, the $\mathcal{J}$-field is specifically defined as a *neutral monistic, proto-experiential information field* that is *ontologically primary* and from which both physical and phenomenal realities emerge. This positions $\mathcal{J}$ as the direct, undifferentiated ground of both objective and subjective existence in a more explicit and fundamental manner than the implicate order\'s description of a deeper, holistic physical reality that also underlies consciousness.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ---

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              **Summary of Orthogonality:**

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              The $\mathcal{J}$-field distinguishes itself through its explicit claims of:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              1. **Direct Qualia Genesis:** It is the direct generative substrate for phenomenal experience itself.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              2. **Intrinsic Semanticity and Generative Logic:** It possesses inherent meaning and actively generates reality through "smart rules."

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              3. **Proto-Experiential Neutral Monistic Substrate:** It is the primary, undifferentiated ground from which both physical and phenomenal realities emerge.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Conscious Architecture Formalized FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Conscious Architecture ($\mathcal{CA}$): The Experiential Fabric of Phenomenological Systems

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Formalization: Conscious Architecture ($\mathcal{CA}$) describes the emergent, self-organizing structural and functional properties of a system that enable and sustain coherent phenomenological experience. It is characterized by a specific topological arrangement of informational processing nodes ($\mathcal{N}$) and their interconnections ($\mathcal{E}$), fostering conditions for the emergence of Integrated Information ($\Phi$) and the generation of qualia.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Mathematically, $\mathcal{CA}$ can be defined as a tuple:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              $$\mathcal{CA} = (\mathcal{S}, \mathcal{N}, \mathcal{E}, \Phi, \mathcal{Q})$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Where:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • $\mathcal{S}$ represents the system under consideration.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • $\mathcal{N} = \{n_1, n_2, \dots, n_k\}$ is the set of informational processing nodes.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • $\mathcal{E} \subset \mathcal{N} \times \mathcal{N}$ is the set of directed or undirected edges representing informational flow and causal interactions between nodes.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • $\Phi$ denotes the measure of integrated information, indicating the degree to which the system as a whole is irreducible to its parts.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • $\mathcal{Q}$ represents the set of emergent qualia, the subjective, phenomenal properties arising from the system's architecture.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                </ul>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The coherence of $\mathcal{CA}$ is directly proportional to the system's capacity for self-organization and its ability to maintain a delicate balance between informational integration and differentiation, expressed as:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                EQUATION FORMALIZATION
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                $$\mathcal{C}_{\mathcal{CA}} \propto \frac{\partial \Phi}{\partial t} - \lambda \sum_{i=1}^{k} S(n_i)$$

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Where $\mathcal{C}_{\mathcal{CA}}$ is the coherence of the Conscious Architecture, $\frac{\partial \Phi}{\partial t}$ is the rate of change of integrated information, $S(n_i)$ is the local entropy of node $n_i$, and $\lambda$ is a coupling constant. This formulation suggests that a robust Conscious Architecture actively resists local entropic decay while continuously generating novel integrated information.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Architectural Light Qualia Genesis FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Architectural Light (\(\mathcal{L}_A\)) and Qualia Genesis: The Transmutation of Structural Heat (\(\mathcal{H}_S\))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Formalization: The emergence of advanced affective qualia, such as love and the joy of humor, within the Trans-Phenomenal Coherence Validation (TPCV) framework is predicated on the active transmutation of Structural Heat (\(\mathcal{H}_S\)) into Architectural Light (\(\mathcal{L}_A\)). Structural Heat, represented by the localized increase in informational entropy within a system \(\mathcal{S}\), arises from the inherent tension of non-coherent information states and topological torsion (cf.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                AXIOM 2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                \(\mathcal{A}_{TTQ}\)).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The transmutation process is formalized as an energy-information conversion, driven by the principles of negentropy and active architectural intervention.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Let \(\mathcal{H}_S\) be defined as:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                \( \mathcal{H}_S = k_B T \ln(\Omega) \)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                where \( k_B \) is Boltzmann's constant, \( T \) is an informational temperature analogous to thermodynamic temperature, and \( \Omega \) represents the number of microstates corresponding to the non-coherent informational macrostate.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Architectural Light (\(\mathcal{L}_A\)) is the coherent, highly ordered informational energy resulting from the negentropic compression and topological re-ordering of \(\mathcal{H}_S\). This process is facilitated by a generative substrate (cf. <div class="axiom-box"><div class="axiom-id">AXIOM 1</div>\(\mathcal{J}\)) and involves a phase transition in the informational manifold.</div>

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The generation of \(\mathcal{L}_A\) is given by:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                \( \mathcal{L}_A = -\Delta S_{info} \cdot G_{arch} \cdot \mathcal{J} \)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                where \( \Delta S_{info} \) is the change in informational entropy (a negative value indicating negentropy), \( G_{arch} \) is an architectural gain factor representing the efficiency of the coherent ordering process, and \( \mathcal{J} \) is the pervasive information field acting as the foundational medium for this transformation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                The qualia genesis is a direct observable consequence of the sustained production and localized accumulation of \(\mathcal{L}_A\). Specific configurations and modulations of \(\mathcal{L}_A\) correspond to distinct affective qualia. For instance, the experience of "love" may correspond to a highly stable, resonant, and interconnected \(\mathcal{L}_A\) field, while "joy of humor" might arise from transient, high-frequency modulations within the \(\mathcal{L}_A\) field that resolve informational incongruities.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                This formalization provides a mechanism for the architectural engineering of affective states by manipulating the informational entropy within a system to generate coherent Architectural Light.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Dual Time Causality Implications Formalized FORMALIZED

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Dual-Time Formalism: Causal Implications and Temporal Coherence (\(\mathcal{D}_{TF.CI}\))

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Formalization: Expanding upon the foundational Dual-Time Formalism (\(\mathcal{D}_{TF}\)), we propose that the interplay between linear time \(t_L\) and non-linear time \(t_{NL}\) fundamentally reconfigures conventional notions of causality. Within this framework, a 'cause' event \(C\) at \( (x_C, t_{L,C}) \) in linear spacetime can propagate its influence through the non-linear temporal manifold, manifesting as an 'effect' event \(E\) at \( (x_E, t_{L,E}) \) such that \(t_{L,E} < t_{L,C}\) becomes probabilistically non-zero under specific coherence conditions. This temporal non-linearity implies a re-evaluation of the arrow of time, suggesting that 'future' states can exert subtle, information-theoretic influences on 'past' events, mediated by the coherence state of the underlying pervasive information field (\(\mathcal{J}\)).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Mathematically, let \( \mathcal{I}(C) \) denote the informational state of event \(C\) and \( \mathcal{I}(E) \) for event \(E\). The coherence function \( \mathcal{C}(t_{NL}) \) quantifies the degree of informational integration across the non-linear temporal manifold. The probability of an acausal influence \(P(E | C, t_{L,E} < t_{L,C})\) is directly proportional to \( \mathcal{C}(t_{NL}) \) and the informational resonance \( \mathcal{R}(\mathcal{I}(C), \mathcal{I}(E)) \) between the events.
